# `api.jobs.search`

> `GET /job/search` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.search(*, job_display_id: int | None = None) -> JobSearchResult
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs search [--job-display-id ...]
```

GET /job/search (ACPortal) — query params.

## Query parameters — `JobSearchParams`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `jobDisplayId` | `Optional[int]` | no | Job display ID to search for |

## Response

Returns `JobSearchResult`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `jobId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Job UUID |
| `jobDisplayId` | `Optional[int]` | no | Job display ID |
| `itemsCount` | `Optional[int]` | no | Number of items in job |
| `pickupDetails` | `Optional[JobSearchTransportDetails]` | no | Pickup details |
| `deliveryDetails` | `Optional[JobSearchTransportDetails]` | no | Delivery details |
| `accessLevel` | `Optional[int]` | no | Access level bitmask |
